title: How to Apply for an EIN (Employer Identification Number)
desc: Get your free federal Tax ID number from the IRS in 10 minutes. Includes what it is, why you need it, and every step of the application.

title: How to Do a Legal Name Change in California
desc: Complete guide to legally changing your name in California including all court forms, filing fees, and specific instructions for Los Angeles, San Francisco, and San Diego.

title: How to Dispute a Credit Report Error Online
desc: Fix errors on your credit report yourself in under an hour, no credit repair company needed. Step-by-step instructions for all three bureaus.

title: How to Write a Will
desc: Create a legally valid will without a lawyer. Covers what to include, how to choose an executor and guardian, free templates, and how to sign it correctly.

title: How to File for Divorce Without a Lawyer
desc: Step-by-step guide for an uncontested divorce with no children or shared property. Best for couples parting on good terms who want a simple, affordable process.

title: How to Start Your Own Investment Account
desc: Open and fund your first brokerage OR retirement account from scratch. Covers account types, best brokerages, what to invest in, and how to build long-term wealth.

title: How to Start and Manage a Monthly Budget
desc: Build a budget that actually works using the 50/30/20 method. Includes a free Excel budget spreadsheet template with income tracker, expense categories, and dashboard.

title: How to File Your Own Income Taxes (IRS Form 1040)
desc: Complete walkthrough of every line on IRS Form 1040 in plain English. Covers all income types, deductions, credits, and how to file for free.
